🧾 Smart Inventory Management System

A desktop-based inventory management application developed using **Python**, **Tkinter**, and **SQLite**, designed to manage stock efficiently, streamline sales workflow, track product movement, and generate data-driven insights such as **demand prediction and sales trends**.

This system automates manual stock handling, reduces errors, and supports decision-making for small to medium business setups.

---

🥇 **Key Highlights**

* 🔐 Admin-friendly interface for managing inventory
* ⚡ Real-time stock update during sales entry
* 🧾 Auto-generated sales bills + history storage
* 🔮 Predictive analysis to forecast stock demand
* 🔔 Low-stock warning + reorder suggestions
* 📧 Email alert option for critical quantity items
* 📊 Visual reports for sales & product performance
* 📤 CSV export for reports and inventory summary

---

## 🔧 Tech Stack & Tools

| Component     | Technology Used                         |
| ------------- | --------------------------------------- |
| GUI           | **Tkinter** (Python)                    |
| Database      | **SQLite**                              |
| Data Handling | **Pandas**                              |
| Visualization | **Matplotlib**                          |
| Automation    | **Scheduling, Email (smtplib)**         |
| Other         | OS, datetime, custom exception handling |

---

🏁 System Modules

 1. **Product Management**

✔ Add, update, delete items
✔ Maintain product price, stock, category
✔ Search/filter using product name or ID

2. **Sales Management**

✔ Generate bills for customer purchases
✔ Auto-reduce stock after sale
✔ Maintain sales history with date/time

3. **Demand Forecasting**

✔ Uses historical sales to predict future demand
✔ Helps in planning next order quantity

4. **Alerts & Notifications**

✔ Low-stock alerts inside dashboard
✔ Auto-email notification to admin

5. **Reports Dashboard**

✔ Sales reports weekly/monthly/yearly
✔ Inventory value calculation
✔ Graphs for sales trends and top-selling products

---

📌 Use Case Examples

🔹 Grocery shops & general stores
🔹 Small business stock management
🔹 College project with real-world application
🔹 Inventory tracking for hardware stores
🔹 Warehouse & retail supply chain
